title.en: And just like that, time passed slowly.

content.en:
One legendary time ancestor after another was fused by Ye Tian, and with the accelerated fusion, Ye Tian began to speed up time in his mind, prompting the process to be completed as soon as possible.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Ye Tian was fusing these time talents at the beginning, so he didn't have time to comprehend time, but it was worth it, and when his fusion was over, the speed of comprehension would be far beyond what it was now.

After a long time.

Ye Tian fused a large amount of time talent, and finally caused a qualitative change in time talent.

this day.

When Ye Tian fused another time talent, the time talent finally began to transform.

Rumble!!!

In an instant, Ye Tian's consciousness seemed to have entered the long river of time roaming, this was not an ordinary long river of time, but a long river of time in the void area, and it was the source of all the long rivers of time.

But this kind of roaming in the long river of time soon came to an end, and the transformation was completely completed by "one three zero".

Immediately, Ye Tian took a look at his time talent.

【Time Ancestor: Legendary】

Sure enough, Ye Tian's time talent reached the level of a legendary-level time ancestor.

"Try it!"

Ye Tian began to practice for the first time in the Time Meditation Area.

Airplanes!

Countless insights came in, making Ye Tian's perception of time improve at an incredible speed.

This feeling has never been felt before.

I have to say that the legendary-level Time Ancestor Fu is indeed too powerful!

"Maybe I'll be able to control the time right here. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Take control of your time!

What kind of concept is this, which is equivalent to having the qualification to enter the Legendary Realm Lord in the future.

Of course, he also knew very well that if he wanted to control time, he was afraid that it would not be so easy, after all, he was far inferior to those half-step Legendary Realm Lords in terms of time attainment.

These half-step Legendary Realm Lords have the hope of controlling time in such a treasure land, because they are not too far away from controlling time in the first place, and he is almost equivalent to starting from ten, while half-step Legendary Realm Lords are starting from seventy or eighty.

So, the difficulty is not the same.

However, Ye Tian was still very confident in himself, at least he had the hope of improving to the point where he was close to controlling time.

"In the years to come, let's make the most of all the time we can see. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The years have passed.

An eternal year!

Two eternal years!

This land is constantly collapsing with the passage of time, and the effect is getting slower and slower, the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords, Dragon Gu Lords, and Ye Tian are all doing their best to comprehend, and Bi Tuo's fate may only be missed once.

The Peak Legendary Realm Lord failed to attack the Eternal Master, and even if there were, it would not be found at all!

Ye Tian's only weakness was that his cultivation was too low, if he was in a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, then the benefits of Enlightenment would be even higher.

Finally, two hundred eternal years have passed.

At this time, Lord Longgu reminded: "This place can no longer be maintained, you should go out, otherwise once this place bursts out, the power that erupts is comparable to the full force of the top Legendary Realm Lord, and even I will be seriously injured." "

"Get out!"

One by one, the half-step Legendary Realm lords stopped cultivating, and Ye Tian also went out with them.

Lord Longgu didn't stay either, and went out directly.

After waiting for about a few decades, this treasure land completely collapsed.

The terrifying power almost destroyed this purple continent, but those time Hengjin was not destroyed.

Wow!

The Dragon Ancient Lord directly grasped this Time Constant Gold Vein in his hand with one hand, and immediately crossed the long river of time in one step, and soon returned to the True Saintless Land.

And the half-step Legendary Realm Lords such as the Frostless Lord began to talk about the harvest this time.

"I've gained a lot, although I still don't hope to step into the Legendary Realm Lord, but at least my strength has increased by a lot of billions."

"I'm still a little bit short of able to fully control the time, and I don't know how many years it will take, or even never be able to control it. "

"Lord Frostless, you're proficient in space, how are you gaining?"

The other half-step Legendary Realm Lords looked at the Frostless Lord, a little curious.

The Frostless Lord was one of the two half-step Legendary Realm Lords who had comprehended in the spatial area, and what she was impacting was also controlling the space.

Her use of space and the way of ice has reached a terrifying level, and the power of ice can shatter even space, so she chooses to try to control space.

Of course, it's not that she's poor at controlling time, it's just that she's not as good as space.

The frostless lord said lightly: "The harvest is very great, I have touched the threshold of controlling the space, and within 100 million eternal years, I am sure to break through 0........"

"Congratulations to Lord Frostless!"

"Congratulations to Lord Frostless!"

"Congratulations to Lord Frostless!"

A half-step Legendary Realm Lord congratulated

One hundred million eternal years seemed like a long time, but in fact, it was only a short period of time for them who were half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Moreover, once the Bridge of Time is established in the True Void Land, this time can be reduced.

It may not be long before the Frostless Lord can completely control the space, so that he can easily impact the Legendary Realm Lord realm.

"Didn't anyone ask me?"

Ye Tian stood there and thought in his heart.

These half-step Legendary Realm Lords didn't think that his gain was much at all, so they didn't ask, so as not to hit Ye Tian.

But in fact, Ye Tian's progress far surpassed these half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

He is also about to touch the threshold of time control, if 99% is compared to touching the threshold of time, then Ye Tian has now reached 98%, and only the last 2% is left. ，

But even if there is only 2% left, it will take a long time for Ye Tian to completely control it.

However, his realm is here, and in the future, when he comprehends and cultivates the Eternal Dao involving time, he can easily cultivate to the legend level.

Once he mastered a large number of Legendary-level Eternal Dao, how terrifying his strength would be.

Therefore, he is the biggest beneficiary of this opportunity.

"Let's go, let's go back, there's no 0.9 worth here. "

Frost-free lord said.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian shuttled in the direction of the source sea.

This time, these eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords didn't take into account Ye Tian's speed, and directly abandoned Ye Tian and shuttled away.

There is no holy place.

The Lord of Longgu began to build the Bridge of Time, and after knowing the news, many legendary lords appeared, all of whom wanted to watch this scene.

And the ancient half-step Legendary Realm Lord who had disappeared for a long time also appeared, after all, the Bridge of Time was also a great opportunity for them.

Among the legendary lords onlookers, Ye Tian was one of them.

Just as Lord Dragongu had prepared the materials and was about to build the Bridge of Time, a voice came from the void.

"Long Gu, where did you get so much Time Hengjin from the Holy Land, and you even dared to build the Bridge of Time!"
